name: slack-bridge
description: Bidirectional Slack integration — forward agent activity to Slack, receive slash commands, sync channels.
author: SoftBacon Software

configSchema.label: Slack Bot Token
configSchema.description: xoxb- token from your Slack app

configSchema.label: Signing Secret
configSchema.description: Slack signing secret for request verification

configSchema.label: Default Slack Channel
configSchema.description: Slack channel ID for general agent updates (e.g. C0123456789)

configSchema.label: Event Filters
configSchema.description: Comma-separated event types to forward to Slack (e.g. task_completed,bug_filed,plan_step_completed). Leave empty for all.

configSchema.label: Discord Webhook URL
configSchema.description: Optional: also forward to Discord via webhook
